headline: Nokia Shares Jumped After Cisco’s Strong Quarterly Results. NOK Could Be the Next Networking Winner.
summary: Nokia shares jumped more than 10% after Cisco’s strong fiscal Q3 2026 results, as investors increasingly view the company as a beneficiary of surging AI infrastructure and networking demand.
